summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Done-for-You UX model and Webinar page. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed: Webinar in sidebar, DoneForYouWrapper showing correct states, no Genera/Rigenera buttons in Masterclass page.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/partner-journey/step-status/{partner_id} returns all step statuses with 4 valid states: in_lavorazione, in_revisione, pronto, approvato
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/step-status/update correctly validates step_id and status, updates MongoDB
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/step-status/approve validates step is 'pronto' before allowing approval, advances partner phase
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/webinar/{partner_id} returns webinar data (null when not yet created - expected)
Frontend DoneForYouWrapper component correctly shows 3 states: PreparazioneView (in_lavorazione/in_revisione), ProntoView (pronto with approve button), ApprovatoView (approvato)
Frontend PartnerSidebar includes Webinar nav item with Video icon at position 2 (after Home)
Frontend WebinarPage shows hero, 6-block structure (Hook, Problema, Errori, Metodo, Offerta, CTA), scheduling, links sections
Frontend MasterclassPage shows Done-for-You model with text 'Non devi scrivere nulla. Rivedi lo script e approva.' - no Genera/Rigenera buttons
Frontend FunnelLightPage, VideocorsoPage, LancioPage all use DoneForYouWrapper component
Admin view shows 'VISTA ADMIN' badge with status badge when viewing partner pages
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
seed_data_creation: Updated step 'email' to 'pronto' status during testing for partner 2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Done-for-You UX model fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' tab → Sidebar shows: Home, Webinar, Il Mio Spazio, Risultati (locked), Supporto Team. The DoneForYouWrapper component handles 4 states: in_lavorazione (team working), in_revisione (team reviewing), pronto (content ready + approve button), approvato (completed). Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has: posizionamento=completato, funnel-light=in corso, masterclass=in_revisione. Backend endpoints: GET /step-status/{partner_id}, POST /step-status/update, POST /step-status/approve, GET /webinar/{partner_id}, POST /webinar/save. The webinar endpoint returns null when no data exists - this is expected behavior.
